subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto the Best-Beloved of the worlds, that thou hast attained the presence of the Dayspring of the Cause and the Manifestation of grace, and hast been invested with the robe of forgiveness from His hand [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد محبوب عالمیان را که بلقای مطلع امر و مظهر فضل فائز شدی و قمیص آمرزش از دست
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
